events.title: George Michael would have been 63
events.blurb: George Michael, the iconic singer-songwriter, was born on June 25, 1963, and would have turned 63 today.

angles.name: Remembering George
angles.copy: Remembering the incredible talent of George Michael today. His music continues to inspire and move generations.

events.title: Anniversary of Michael Jackson’s Death
events.blurb: Today marks 17 years since the passing of the King of Pop, Michael Jackson, who died on June 25, 2009.

angles.name: King of Pop Tribute
angles.copy: 17 years ago, we lost a legend. Michael Jackson's influence on music and culture remains unmatched.

events.title: Ringo Starr turns 86
events.blurb: The legendary Beatles drummer, Ringo Starr, celebrates his 86th birthday today, born on July 7, 1940.

angles.name: Happy Birthday Ringo
angles.copy: Happy 86th birthday to the one and only Ringo Starr! Still keeping the beat for generations.

events.title: Brian May turns 79
events.blurb: Queen's iconic guitarist and astrophysicist, Brian May, celebrates his 79th birthday today, born on July 19, 1947.

angles.name: Happy Birthday Brian
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 79th birthday to Queen's guitar hero, Brian May! Rock on!

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: The Rolling Stones frontman, Mick Jagger, celebrates his 83rd birthday today, born on July 26, 1943.

angles.name: Happy Birthday Mick
angles.copy: Still got the moves! Happy 83rd birthday to the legendary Mick Jagger.

events.title: MTV launched 45 years ago
events.blurb: Music Television (MTV) launched on August 1, 1981, with The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star' as its very first music video.

angles.name: MTV Anniversary
angles.copy: 45 years ago today, MTV changed music forever. Remember the first video they ever played?

events.title: Oasis' 'Definitely Maybe' turns 32
events.blurb: Oasis released their seminal debut album 'Definitely Maybe' on August 29, 1994, which celebrates its 32nd anniversary.

angles.name: Definitely Maybe Anniversary
angles.copy: 32 years since Oasis dropped 'Definitely Maybe' and redefined a generation. What's your favourite track?

events.title: Woodstock Festival 57th Anniversary
events.blurb: The iconic Woodstock Music & Art Fair took place from August 15-18, 1969, marking 57 years since the legendary event.

angles.name: Woodstock Remembered
angles.copy: Peace, love, and music. Remembering 57 years since the legendary Woodstock Festival.

events.title: Anniversary of Elvis Presley’s Death
events.blurb: Today marks 49 years since the passing of the King of Rock and Roll, Elvis Presley, who died on August 16, 1977.

angles.name: Remembering Elvis
angles.copy: 49 years on, the King of Rock and Roll, Elvis Presley, still reigns supreme. His legacy lives on.

events.title: Anniversary of Tupac Shakur's Death
events.blurb: Today marks 30 years since the tragic death of rap icon Tupac Shakur, who passed away on September 13, 1996.

angles.name: Tupac's Legacy
angles.copy: 30 years. The impact of Tupac Shakur's music and message still resonates powerfully today.

events.title: Anniversary of Jimi Hendrix’s Death
events.blurb: Today marks 56 years since the passing of guitar legend Jimi Hendrix, who died on September 18, 1970.

angles.name: Jimi Hendrix Tribute
angles.copy: 56 years since we lost a true innovator. Jimi Hendrix's guitar wizardry continues to inspire.

events.title: The Beatles' 'Abbey Road' turns 57
events.blurb: The Beatles released their eleventh studio album, 'Abbey Road', on September 26, 1969, marking its 57th anniversary.

angles.name: Abbey Road Anniversary
angles.copy: Still crossing that road 57 years later. The Beatles' 'Abbey Road' remains a masterpiece.

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: The Pretenders' frontwoman, Chrissie Hynde, celebrates her 75th birthday today, born on September 7, 1951.

angles.name: Happy Birthday Chrissie
angles.copy: Happy 75th birthday to the rock icon Chrissie Hynde! Still a force to be reckoned with.

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: The unmistakable voice of Oasis, Liam Gallagher, celebrates his 54th birthday today, born on September 21, 1972.

angles.name: Happy Birthday Liam
angles.copy: You know the drill. Happy 54th birthday to the one and only Liam Gallagher!

events.title: John Lennon's 'Imagine' turns 55
events.blurb: John Lennon released his iconic anthem 'Imagine' on October 1, 1971, which celebrates its 55th anniversary.

angles.name: Imagine 55th Anniversary
angles.copy: 55 years of 'Imagine'. John Lennon's timeless message of peace resonates as strongly as ever.

events.title: First iPod launched 25 years ago
events.blurb: Apple unveiled the original iPod on October 23, 2001, revolutionising how we carry our music, marking its 25th anniversary.

angles.name: iPod 25th Anniversary
angles.copy: Remember your first iPod? 25 years ago, Apple changed personal music forever.

events.title: Happy James Bond Day!
events.blurb: October 5th is celebrated annually as James Bond Day, commemorating the release of the first Bond film, 'Dr. No', in 1962.

angles.name: Bond Themes
angles.copy: Happy James Bond Day! What's your favourite Bond theme tune of all time?

events.title: John Lennon would have been 86
events.blurb: John Lennon, the legendary co-founder of The Beatles, was born on October 9, 1940, and would have turned 86 today.

angles.name: Remembering John Lennon
angles.copy: Remembering the visionary John Lennon, who would have been 86 today. His music and message live on.
